## Source: amazon-inspector (e56e452f9b6929e66be95ebdf49d432e7bbfeb76fc349123bcc39175f412e802)
The package @spinstorm/shared was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (7dcec109b60aa235a95a55c3035c9e20d01dd36f22c670ab32a5d88b51bd3b70)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified '@spinstorm/shared' @ 99.99.99 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
